title: Evidence

evidence_id.description: Globally unique evidence identifier. Format: evidence-{slug}-{seq}.

owner_party_id.description: Party that owns this evidence in the owner_private domain.

source.description: Material origin or generation source (e.g. document name, system origin).

summary.description: Human-readable summary of what this evidence shows.

evidence_type.description: 书证 documentary | 物证 physical | 证人证言 witness_statement | 电子数据 electronic_data | 鉴定意见 expert_opinion | 视听资料 audio_visual

target_fact_ids.description: Fact propositions this evidence is intended to prove. Must have at least one entry.

target_issue_ids.description: Issues this evidence is associated with. May be empty at indexing time.

submitted_by_party_id.description: Null until evidence is submitted to the common pool.

admissibility_notes.description: Notes on authenticity, relevance, legality, and probative value. Null at indexing time.

legality_risk.description: 证据合法性风险（v1.5 质证四维度之一）。Null until scored.

description: Evidence is a case material object representing a piece of evidence. It is indexed into CaseWorkspace.material_index.Evidence and must bind at least one target_fact_id. Initial status is 'private'; initial access_domain is 'owner_private'.
